creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text: Tagging this one with my personal gnugrep-only tag. Tentatively keeping it open for now, because I need to think about how to manage gnugrep only bugs on older branches. Switching older branches (11.x and 12.x) to bsdgrep by default will likely not be feasible, but we should perhaps come up with a good/easy migration that can be done at runtime by sysadmin/user.
